t.haleem: [Prophet], do you see how deluded those who dispute God’s messages are
t.maariful: Have you not seen those who quarrel in Allah’s verses? From where are they being turned away (by their selfish desires)
t.khattab: Have you not seen how those who dispute Allah’s signs are turned away
t.ghali: Have you not regarded the ones who dispute concerning the signs of Allah; however are they turned about
t.irving: Have you not considered how the ones who argue about God´s signs actually disregard them
t.iwq: Do you not consider those who dispute concerning the signs of Allah - how are they averted

t_id.kemenag: Apakah kamu tidak melihat kepada orang-orang yang membantah ayat-ayat Allah? Bagaimanakah mereka dapat dipalingkan?
t_id.sabiq: Tidakkah kamu melihat orang-orang yang memperdebatkan bukti-bukti kebesaran Allah yang jelas, bagaimana mereka berpaling dari bukti-bukti itu dan tetap bersikeras untuk berada dalam kesesatan?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apakah kamu tidak melihat kepada orang-orang yang membantah ayat-ayat Allah?) membantah Alquran. (Bagaimanakah) (mereka dapat dipalingkan) dari iman?
t_id.iwq: Apakah kamu tidak melihat kepada orang-orang yang membantah ayat-ayat Allah? Bagaimanakah mereka dapat dipalingkan?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ألم ترَ إلى الذين يجادلون في آيات الله» القرآن «أنَّى» كيف «يصرفون» عن الإيمان
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ يُجَٰدِلُونَ فِيٓ ءَايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ أَنَّىٰ يُصۡرَفُونَ (أَنَّى يُصْرَفُونَ: كَيْفَ يَعْدِلُونَ عَنْهَا مَعْ صِحَّتِهَا؟)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apakah kamu tidak melihat kepada orang-orang yang membantah ayat-ayat Allah?) membantah Alquran. (Bagaimanakah) (mereka dapat dipalingkan) dari iman

ar: ٱلَّذِینَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلۡكِتَـٰبِ وَبِمَاۤ أَرۡسَلۡنَا بِهِۦ رُسُلَنَاۖ فَسَوۡفَ یَعۡلَمُونَ
ar_simple: الَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا بِالْكِتَابِ وَبِمَا أَرْسَلْنَا بِهِ رُسُلَنَا ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ

t.sahih-int: Those who deny the Book and that with which We sent Our messengers - they are going to know
t.asad: they who give the lie to this divine writ and [thus] to all [the messages] with which We sent forth Our apostles [of old]? But in time they will come to know [how blind they have been: they will know it on Judgment Day]
t.yusuf-ali: Those who reject the Book and the (revelations) with which We sent our messengers: but soon shall they know
t.pickthall: Those who deny the Scripture and that wherewith We send Our messengers. But they will come to know
t.arberry: Those who cry lies to the Book and that wherewith We sent Our Messengers -- soon they will know
t.hilali-khan: Those who deny the Book (this Quran), and that with which We sent Our Messengers (i.e. to worship none but Allah Alone sincerely, and to reject all false deities and to confess resurrection after the death for recompense) they will come to know (when they will be cast into the Fire of Hell)
t.itani: Those who call the Book a lie, and what We sent Our messengers with—they will surely know.
t.mubarakpuri: Those who deny the Book, and that with which We sent Our Messengers they will come to know.
t.qarib: those who deny the Book and the messages We sent with Our Messengers? They will surely come to know
t.wahiduddin: those who reject the Book and that with which We sent Our messengers shall soon know
t.shakir: Those who reject the Book and that with which We have sent Our Apostle; but they shall soon come to know
t.haleem: those who reject the Scripture and the messages We have sent through Our messengers? They will find out
t.maariful: those who rejected the Book and what We sent with Our messengers. So, they will soon come to know
t.khattab: ˹They are˺ the ones who reject this Book and all ˹scriptures˺ We sent Our messengers with. So they will know ˹the consequences˺
t.ghali: The ones who have cried lies to the Book and that wherewith We sent Our Messengers, will then eventually know
t.irving: Those who reject the Book and anything We have sent along with Our messengers shall know
t.iwq: Those who deny the Book and that with which We sent Our messengers - they are going to know

t_id.kemenag: (Yaitu) orang-orang yang mendustakan Al Kitab (Al Quran) dan wahyu yang dibawa oleh rasul-rasul Kami yang telah Kami utus. Kelak mereka akan mengetahui,
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang yang mendustakan al-Qur'ân dan wahyu yang Kami turunkan kepada utusan-utusan Kami, pasti akan mengetahui akibat perbuatannya, pada saat lehernya dibelenggu dengan rantai, dan ditarik dalam air yang sangat panas kemudian dilempar ke dalam neraka yang mereka rasakan panasnya. Mereka diejek dengan dikatakan, "Mana sembahan kalian selain Allah yang dulu pernah kalian sembah itu?" Orang kafir menjawab, "Mereka telah menghilang dari kami. Bahkan sebenarnya, di dunia dulu kami belum pernah menyembah sesuatu yang pantas disembah." Dengan cara seperti itu Allah menyesatkan orang kafir dari kebenaran, karena mengetahui bahwa mereka lebih memilih kesesatan dari pada petunjuk.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Orang-orang yang mendustakan Alkitab) yakni Al-Qur'an (dan wahyu yang dibawa oleh rasul-rasul Kami yang telah Kami utus) dengan membawa ajaran tauhid dan berita tentang adanya hari berbangkit; mereka adalah orang-orang kafir Mekah. (Kelak mereka akan mengetahui) akibat dari kedustaan mereka.
t_id.iwq: (Yaitu) orang-orang yang mendustakan Al Kitab (Al Al-Quran) dan wahyu yang dibawa oleh rasul-rasul Kami yang telah Kami utus. Kelak mereka akan mengetahui,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «الذين كذبوا بالكتاب» القرآن «وبما أرسلنا به رسلنا» من التوحيد والبعث وهم كفار مكة «فسوف يعلمون» عقوبة تكذيبهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَبِمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا بِهِۦ رُسُلَنَاۖ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُونَ (بِالْكِتَابِ: بِالقُرْآنِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Orang-orang yang mendustakan Alkitab) yakni Al-Qur'an (dan wahyu yang dibawa oleh rasul-rasul Kami yang telah Kami utus) dengan membawa ajaran tauhid dan berita tentang adanya hari berbangkit; mereka adalah orang-orang kafir Mekah. (Kelak mereka akan mengetahui) akibat dari kedustaan mereka

ar: إِذِ ٱلۡأَغۡلَـٰلُ فِیۤ أَعۡنَـٰقِهِمۡ وَٱلسَّلَـٰسِلُ یُسۡحَبُونَ
ar_simple: إِذِ الْأَغْلَالُ فِي أَعْنَاقِهِمْ وَالسَّلَاسِلُ يُسْحَبُونَ

t.sahih-int: When the shackles are around their necks and the chains; they will be dragged
t.asad: when they shall have to carry the shackles and chains [of their own making] around their necks
t.yusuf-ali: When the yokes (shall be) round their necks, and the chains; they shall be dragged along
t.pickthall: When carcans are about their necks and chains. They are dragged
t.arberry: When the fetters and chains are on their necks, and they dragged
t.hilali-khan: When iron collars will be rounded over their necks, and the chains, they shall be dragged along
t.itani: When the yokes are around their necks, and they will be dragged by the chains.
t.mubarakpuri: When iron collars will be rounded over their necks, and the chains, they shall be dragged along,
t.qarib: when they have shackles and chains around their necks, and are dragged
t.wahiduddin: when, with iron collars and chains around their necks, they are dragged
t.shakir: When the fetters and the chains shall be on their necks; they shall be dragged
t.haleem: when, with iron collars and chains around their necks, they are dragged
t.maariful: when shackles will be round their necks, and chains. They will be dragged
t.khattab: when shackles will be around their necks and chains ˹on their legs˺. They will be dragged
t.ghali: As the shackles are on their necks, and (also) the chains; they are pulled
t.irving: when fetters as well as chains are placed around their necks. They will be hauled along
t.iwq: When the shackles are around their necks and the chains; they will be dragged

t_id.kemenag: ketika belenggu dan rantai dipasang di leher mereka, seraya mereka diseret,
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang yang mendustakan al-Qur'ân dan wahyu yang Kami turunkan kepada utusan-utusan Kami, pasti akan mengetahui akibat perbuatannya, pada saat lehernya dibelenggu dengan rantai, dan ditarik dalam air yang sangat panas kemudian dilempar ke dalam neraka yang mereka rasakan panasnya. Mereka diejek dengan dikatakan, "Mana sembahan kalian selain Allah yang dulu pernah kalian sembah itu?" Orang kafir menjawab, "Mereka telah menghilang dari kami. Bahkan sebenarnya, di dunia dulu kami belum pernah menyembah sesuatu yang pantas disembah." Dengan cara seperti itu Allah menyesatkan orang kafir dari kebenaran, karena mengetahui bahwa mereka lebih memilih kesesatan dari pada petunjuk.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ketika belenggu dipasang di leher mereka) lafal Idz di sini bermakna Idzaa yakni ketika (dan rantai-rantai) pun dipasang pula di leher mereka. Lafal As-Salaasilu ini diathafkan kepada lafal Al-Aghlaalu. Atau berkedudukan menjadi Mubtada sedangkan Khabarnya tidak disebutkan, yaitu lafal Fii Arjulihim. Dengan demikian maka artinya ialah, Dan rantai-rantai pun dipasang pada kaki mereka Atau Khabar lafal As-Salaasilu ini ialah ayat berikutnya, yaitu (seraya mereka diseret) dengannya.
t_id.iwq: ketika belenggu dan rantai dipasang di leher mereka, seraya mereka diseret,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إذ الأغلال في أعناقهم» إذ بمعنى إذا «والسلاسل» عطف على الأغلال فتكون في الأعناق، أو مبتدأ خبره محذوف، أي في أرجلهم أو خبره «يسحبون» أي يجرون بها
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِذِ ٱلۡأَغۡلَٰلُ فِيٓ أَعۡنَٰقِهِمۡ وَٱلسَّلَٰسِلُ يُسۡحَبُونَ (وَالسَّلَاسِلُ: القُيُودُ فِي الأَرْجُلِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ketika belenggu dipasang di leher mereka) lafal Idz di sini bermakna Idzaa yakni ketika (dan rantai-rantai) pun dipasang pula di leher mereka. Lafal As-Salaasilu ini diathafkan kepada lafal Al-Aghlaalu. Atau berkedudukan menjadi Mubtada sedangkan Khabarnya tidak disebutkan, yaitu lafal Fii Arjulihim. Dengan demikian maka artinya ialah, Dan rantai-rantai pun dipasang pada kaki mereka Atau Khabar lafal As-Salaasilu ini ialah ayat berikutnya, yaitu (seraya mereka diseret) dengannya

ar: فِی ٱلۡحَمِیمِ ثُمَّ فِی ٱلنَّارِ یُسۡجَرُونَ
ar_simple: فِي الْحَمِيمِ ثُمَّ فِي النَّارِ يُسْجَرُونَ

t.sahih-int: In boiling water; then in the Fire they will be filled [with flame]
t.asad: and are dragged into burning despair, and in the end become fuel for the fire [of hell]
t.yusuf-ali: In the boiling fetid fluid: then in the Fire shall they be burned
t.pickthall: Through boiling waters; then they are thrust into the Fire
t.arberry: into the boiling water, then into the Fire they are poured
t.hilali-khan: In the boiling water, then they will be burned in the Fire
t.itani: Into the boiling water, then in the Fire they will be consumed.
t.mubarakpuri: In the boiling water, then they will be burned in the Fire.
t.qarib: in boiling water, and are then thrown into the Fire, where they will be consumed
t.wahiduddin: into the boiling water and then are thrown into the Fire
t.shakir: Into boiling water, then in the fire shall they be burned
t.haleem: into scalding water, and then burned in the Fire
t.maariful: into the hot water after which they will be thrown into the Fire as a fuel
t.khattab: through boiling water, then burned in the Fire ˹as fuel˺
t.ghali: Into the scalding water; thereafter they are to be seethed in the Fire
t.irving: into scalding water; then they will be scorched in the Fire
t.iwq: In boiling water; then in the Fire they will be filled with flame

t_id.kemenag: ke dalam air yang sangat panas, kemudian mereka dibakar dalam api,
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang yang mendustakan al-Qur'ân dan wahyu yang Kami turunkan kepada utusan-utusan Kami, pasti akan mengetahui akibat perbuatannya, pada saat lehernya dibelenggu dengan rantai, dan ditarik dalam air yang sangat panas kemudian dilempar ke dalam neraka yang mereka rasakan panasnya. Mereka diejek dengan dikatakan, "Mana sembahan kalian selain Allah yang dulu pernah kalian sembah itu?" Orang kafir menjawab, "Mereka telah menghilang dari kami. Bahkan sebenarnya, di dunia dulu kami belum pernah menyembah sesuatu yang pantas disembah." Dengan cara seperti itu Allah menyesatkan orang kafir dari kebenaran, karena mengetahui bahwa mereka lebih memilih kesesatan dari pada petunjuk.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ke dalam air yang sangat panas) yakni neraka Jahanam (kemudian mereka dibakar dalam api) maksudnya, mereka dibakar oleh api neraka.
t_id.iwq: ke dalam air yang sangat panas, kemudian mereka dibakar dalam api,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «في الحميم» أي جهنم «ثم في النار يسجرون» يوقدون
tafsir.siraj-ar: فِي ٱلۡحَمِيمِ ثُمَّ فِي ٱلنَّارِ يُسۡجَرُونَ (الْحَمِيمِ: المَاءِ الَّذِي بَلَغَ غَايَةَ الحَرَارَةِ, يُسْجَرُونَ: يُوقَدُ عَلَيْهِمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ke dalam air yang sangat panas) yakni neraka Jahanam (kemudian mereka dibakar dalam api) maksudnya, mereka dibakar oleh api neraka

ar: ثُمَّ قِیلَ لَهُمۡ أَیۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تُشۡرِكُونَ
ar_simple: ثُمَّ قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنْتُمْ تُشْرِكُونَ

t.sahih-int: Then it will be said to them, "Where is that which you used to associate [with Him in worship]
t.asad: And then they will be asked: “Where now are those [powers] to which you were wont to ascribe divinity
t.yusuf-ali: Then shall it be said to them: "Where are the (deities) to which ye gave part-worship
t.pickthall: Then it is said unto them: Where are (all) that ye used to make partners (in the Sovereignty)
t.arberry: then it is said to them, 'Where are those you associated, apart from God
t.hilali-khan: Then it will be said to them: "Where are (all) those whom you used to join in worship as partners
t.itani: Then it will be said to them, “Where are those you used to deify?
t.mubarakpuri: Then it will be said to them: "Where are (all) those whom you used to consider partners"
t.qarib: It will then be said to them, "Where are those [associates] whom you used to consider divine
t.wahiduddin: and then they will be asked, "Where are those whom you associated [with God]
t.shakir: Then shall it be said to them: Where is that which you used to set up
t.haleem: and asked, ‘Where now are those you called upon
t.maariful: Then, it will be said to them, “Where are those whom you used to associate (in worship)
t.khattab: Then they will be asked, “Where are those ˹idols˺ you used to associate
t.ghali: Thereafter it is said to them, "Where are the ones you used to associate
t.irving: Next they will be told: ´Where are the [false gods] you have been associating with
t.iwq: Then it will be said to them, "Where is that which you used to associate with Him in worship

t_id.kemenag: kemudian dikatakan kepada mereka: "Manakah berhala-berhala yang selalu kamu persekutukan,
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang yang mendustakan al-Qur'ân dan wahyu yang Kami turunkan kepada utusan-utusan Kami, pasti akan mengetahui akibat perbuatannya, pada saat lehernya dibelenggu dengan rantai, dan ditarik dalam air yang sangat panas kemudian dilempar ke dalam neraka yang mereka rasakan panasnya. Mereka diejek dengan dikatakan, "Mana sembahan kalian selain Allah yang dulu pernah kalian sembah itu?" Orang kafir menjawab, "Mereka telah menghilang dari kami. Bahkan sebenarnya, di dunia dulu kami belum pernah menyembah sesuatu yang pantas disembah." Dengan cara seperti itu Allah menyesatkan orang kafir dari kebenaran, karena mengetahui bahwa mereka lebih memilih kesesatan dari pada petunjuk.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian dikatakan kepada mereka) sebagai celaan dan penelanjangan, ("Manakah berhala-berhala yang selalu kalian persekutukan?)
t_id.iwq: kemudian dikatakan kepada mereka: "Manakah berhala-berhala yang selalu kamu persekutukan,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ثم قيل لهم» تبكيا «أين ما كنتم تشركون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: ثُمَّ قِيلَ لَهُمۡ أَيۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تُشۡرِكُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian dikatakan kepada mereka) sebagai celaan dan penelanjangan, ("Manakah berhala-berhala yang selalu kalian persekutukan)

ar: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِۖ قَالُوا۟ ضَلُّوا۟ عَنَّا بَل لَّمۡ نَكُن نَّدۡعُوا۟ مِن قَبۡلُ شَیۡءࣰاۚ كَذَ ٰلِكَ یُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡكَـٰفِرِینَ
ar_simple: مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ ۖ قَالُوا ضَلُّوا عَنَّا بَلْ لَمْ نَكُنْ نَدْعُو مِنْ قَبْلُ شَيْئًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ اللَّهُ الْكَافِرِينَ

t.sahih-int: Other than Allah?" They will say, "They have departed from us; rather, we did not used to invoke previously anything." Thus does Allah put astray the disbelievers
t.asad: [side by side with God?” They will answer: “They have forsaken us - or, rather, what we were wont to invoke aforetime did not exist at all!” And they will be told:] “It is thus that God lets the deniers of the truth go astray
t.yusuf-ali: In derogation of Allah?" They will reply: "They have left us in the lurch: Nay, we invoked not, of old, anything (that had real existence)." Thus does Allah leave the Unbelievers to stray
t.pickthall: Beside Allah? They say: They have failed us; but we used not to pray to anything before. Thus doth Allah send astray the disbelievers (in His guidance)
t.arberry: They shall say, 'They have gone astray from us; nay, but it was nothing at all that we called upon aforetime.' Even so God leads astray the unbelievers
t.hilali-khan: Besides Allah" They will say: "They have vanished from us: Nay, we did not invoke (worship) anything before." Thus Allah leads astray the disbelievers
t.itani: Instead of God?” They will say, “They have abandoned us. In fact, we were praying to nothing before.” Thus God sends the disbelievers astray.
t.mubarakpuri: "Besides Allah" They will say: "They have vanished from us. Nay, we did not call upon anything before." Thus Allah leads astray the disbelievers.
t.qarib: other than God?" They will say, "They have departed from us; or, rather, those we used to call upon proved to be nothing. [They will be told,] "This is how God let those who deny the truth stray
t.wahiduddin: They will say, "They have been lost to us; nay, we did not invoke anything before [that had real existence]." Thus God leaves the deniers of the truth to stray
t.shakir: Besides Allah? They shall say: They are gone away from us, nay, we used not to call upon anything before. Thus does Allah confound the unbelievers
t.haleem: besides God?’ They will say, ‘They have abandoned us: those we called upon before were really nothing at all.’ ‘This is how God lets disbelievers go astray
t.maariful: beside Allah?” They will say, “They are lost to us, rather, we used to invoke nothing at all.” This is how Allah makes disbelievers get lost
t.khattab: with Allah?” They will cry, “They have ˹all˺ failed us. In fact, we did not invoke anything ˹real˺ before.” This is how Allah leaves the disbelievers to stray
t.ghali: Apart from Allah?" They will say, "They have erred away from us; no indeed, we used not to invoke anything earlier." Thus Allah leads the disbelievers into error
t.irving: instead of God [Alone]?" They will say: "They have left us in the lurch. In fact we did not appeal to anything previously." Thus God lets disbelievers go astray
t.iwq: Other than Allah?" They will say, "They have departed from us; rather, we did not used to invoke previously anything." Thus does Allah put astray those who disbelieve

t_id.kemenag: (yang kamu sembah) selain Allah?" Mereka menjawab: "Mereka telah hilang lenyap dari kami, bahkan kami dahulu tiada pernah menyembah sesuatu". Seperti demikianlah Allah menyesatkan orang-orang kafir.
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang yang mendustakan al-Qur'ân dan wahyu yang Kami turunkan kepada utusan-utusan Kami, pasti akan mengetahui akibat perbuatannya, pada saat lehernya dibelenggu dengan rantai, dan ditarik dalam air yang sangat panas kemudian dilempar ke dalam neraka yang mereka rasakan panasnya. Mereka diejek dengan dikatakan, "Mana sembahan kalian selain Allah yang dulu pernah kalian sembah itu?" Orang kafir menjawab, "Mereka telah menghilang dari kami. Bahkan sebenarnya, di dunia dulu kami belum pernah menyembah sesuatu yang pantas disembah." Dengan cara seperti itu Allah menyesatkan orang kafir dari kebenaran, karena mengetahui bahwa mereka lebih memilih kesesatan dari pada petunjuk.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Selain Allah?") yang kalian sembah selain-Nya; yang dimaksud adalah berhala-berhala. (Mereka menjawab, "Mereka telah hilang lenyap) artinya, telah tiada (dari kami) maka kami tidak melihat mereka (bahkan kami dahulu tiada pernah menyembah sesuatu") mereka mengingkari penyembahan mereka kepada berhala-berhala itu. Kemudian berhala-berhala sesembahan mereka itu didatangkan, selanjutnya dikatakan kepada mereka, sebagaimana yang disebutkan dalam ayat yang lain, yaitu firman-Nya, "Sesungguhnya kalian dan apa yang kalian sembah selain Allah, adalah makanan Jahanam." (Q.S. Al-Anbiya, 98). (Seperti demikianlah) yakni sebagaimana disesatkan-Nya orang-orang yang mendustakan Alquran (Allah menyesatkan orang-orang kafir.)
t_id.iwq: (yang kamu sembah) selain Allah?" Mereka menjawab: "Mereka telah hilang lenyap dari kami, bahkan kami dahulu tiada pernah menyembah sesuatu". Seperti demikianlah Allah menyesatkan orang-orang kafir.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «من دون الله» معه وهي الأصنام «قالوا ضلوا» غابوا «عنا» فلا نراهم «بل لم نكن تدعوا من قبل شيئا» أنكروا عبادتهم إياها ثم أحضرت قال تعالى: (إنكم وما تعبدون من دون الله حصب جهنم) أي وقودها «كذلك» أي مثل إضلال هؤلاء المكذبين «يضل الله الكافرين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِۖ قَالُواْ ضَلُّواْ عَنَّا بَل لَّمۡ نَكُن نَّدۡعُواْ مِن قَبۡلُ شَيۡـٔٗاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ (ضَلُّوا عَنَّا: غَابُوا عَنْ عُيُونِنَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Selain Allah?") yang kalian sembah selain-Nya; yang dimaksud adalah berhala-berhala. (Mereka menjawab, "Mereka telah hilang lenyap) artinya, telah tiada (dari kami) maka kami tidak melihat mereka (bahkan kami dahulu tiada pernah menyembah sesuatu") mereka mengingkari penyembahan mereka kepada berhala-berhala itu. Kemudian berhala-berhala sesembahan mereka itu didatangkan, selanjutnya dikatakan kepada mereka, sebagaimana yang disebutkan dalam ayat yang lain, yaitu firman-Nya, "Sesungguhnya kalian dan apa yang kalian sembah selain Allah, adalah makanan Jahanam." (Q.S. Al-Anbiya, 98). (Seperti demikianlah) yakni sebagaimana disesatkan-Nya orang-orang yang mendustakan Alquran (Allah menyesatkan orang-orang kafir)

ar: ذَ ٰلِكُم بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَفۡرَحُونَ فِی ٱلۡأَرۡضِ بِغَیۡرِ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَمۡرَحُونَ
ar_simple: ذَٰلِكُمْ بِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ فِي الْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ الْحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَمْرَحُونَ

t.sahih-int: [The angels will say], "That was because you used to exult upon the earth without right and you used to behave insolently
t.asad: this is an outcome of your having arrogantly exulted on earth without any [concern for what is] right, and of your having been so full of self-conceit
t.yusuf-ali: That was because ye were wont to rejoice on the earth in things other than the Truth, and that ye were wont to be insolent
t.pickthall: (And it is said unto them): This is because ye exulted in the earth without right, and because ye were petulant
t.arberry: That is because you rejoiced in the earth without right, and were exultant
t.hilali-khan: That was because you had been exulting in the earth without any right (by worshipping others instead of Allah and by committing crimes), and that you used to rejoice extremely (in your error)
t.itani: That is because you used to rejoice on earth in other than the truth, and because you used to behave with vanity.
t.mubarakpuri: That was because you had been exulting in the earth without any right, and that you used to rejoice extremely.
t.qarib: all because you used to rejoice on earth in things other than the truth, and you were full of vanity
t.wahiduddin: that is because you exulted in the land without justification and because you behaved insolently
t.shakir: That is because you exulted in the land unjustly and because you behaved insolently
t.haleem: all because on earth you revelled in untruth and ran wild
t.maariful: (It will be said to them,) “This is because you used to rejoice on the earth wrongfully, and because you used to show arrogance
t.khattab: ˹They will be told,˺ “This ˹punishment˺ is for being prideful on earth unjustly and for acting arrogantly
t.ghali: That is (due to the fact) that you used to exult in the earth untruthfully, (Literally: without the truth) and (due to the fact) that you used to live in merriment
t.irving: That is because you went around the earth rejoicing without having any right to and because you felt so elated
t.iwq: The angels will say, "That was because you used to exult upon the earth without right and you used to behave insolently

t_id.kemenag: Yang demikian itu disebabkan karena kamu bersuka ria di muka bumi dengan tidak benar dan karena kamu selalu bersuka ria (dalam kemaksiatan).
t_id.sabiq: Dikatakan lagi kepada mereka, "Azab yang kalian rasakan itu disebabkan oleh kegembiraan kalian di dunia yang bukan pada tempatnya, dan oleh kegembiraan yang berlebih-lebihan atas kesusahan yang menimpa para nabi dan kekasih Allah. Masuklah kalian semua ke dalam pintu-pintu jahanam, yang telah ditetapkan kekal buat kalian! Dan sejelek-jelek tempat tinggal untuk orang-orang yang sombong adalah neraka jahanam."
t_id.jalalayn-id: Dikatakan pula kepada mereka, ("Yang demikian itu) yakni azab itu (disebabkan kalian bersuka ria di muka bumi dengan tidak benar) yaitu melakukan perbuatan syirik dan ingkar kepada adanya hari berbangkit (dan karena kalian selalu bersuka ria) artinya, terlalu berlebih-lebihan di dalam bersuka ria.
t_id.iwq: Yang demikian itu disebabkan karena kamu bersuka ria di muka bumi dengan tidak benar dan karena kamu selalu bersuka ria (dalam kemaksiatan).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: ويقال لهم أيضا «ذلكم» العذاب «بما كنتم تفرحون في الأرض بغير الحق» من الإشراك وإنكار البعث «وبما كنتم تمرحون» تتوسعون في الفرح
tafsir.siraj-ar: ذَٰلِكُم بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَفۡرَحُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَمۡرَحُونَ (تَمْرَحُونَ: تَتَوَسَّعُونَ فيِ الفَرَحِ أَشَرًا وَبَطَرًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dikatakan pula kepada mereka, ("Yang demikian itu) yakni azab itu (disebabkan kalian bersuka ria di muka bumi dengan tidak benar) yaitu melakukan perbuatan syirik dan ingkar kepada adanya hari berbangkit (dan karena kalian selalu bersuka ria) artinya, terlalu berlebih-lebihan di dalam bersuka ria

ar: ٱدۡخُلُوۤا۟ أَبۡوَ ٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدِینَ فِیهَاۖ فَبِئۡسَ مَثۡوَى ٱلۡمُتَكَبِّرِینَ
ar_simple: ادْخُلُوا أَبْوَابَ جَهَنَّمَ خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ مَثْوَى الْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ

t.sahih-int: Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant
t.asad: Enter [now] the gates of hell, therein to abide: and how vile an abode for all who are given to false pride!”
t.yusuf-ali: Enter ye the gates of Hell, to dwell therein: and evil is (this) abode of the arrogant
t.pickthall: Enter ye the gates of hell, to dwell therein. Evil is the habitation of the scornful
t.arberry: Enter the gates of Gehenna, to dwell therein forever.' How evil is the lodging of those that are proud
t.hilali-khan: Enter the gates of Hell to abide therein, and (indeed) what an evil abode of the arrogant
t.itani: Enter the gates of Hell, to remain therein forever. What a terrible dwelling for the arrogant.
t.mubarakpuri: Enter the gates of Hell to abide therein, and (indeed) what an evil abode of the arrogant!
t.qarib: Enter the gates of Hell, to remain there eternally, a terrible home for the arrogant
t.wahiduddin: Enter the gates of Hell to stay therein forever. The abode of the arrogant is evil
t.shakir: Enter the gates of hell to abide therein, evil then is the abode of the proud
t.haleem: Enter the gates of Hell, there to remain- an evil home for the arrogant.’
t.maariful: Enter the gates of Jahannam to live in it forever. So, how evil is the abode of the arrogant
t.khattab: Enter the gates of Hell, to stay there forever. What an evil home for the arrogant!”
t.ghali: Enter the gates of Hell, eternally (abiding) therein." Miserable then is the lodging of the proud (ones)
t.irving: Enter Hell´s gates to remain there; how wretched will the lodging of the overbearing be
t.iwq: Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant

t_id.kemenag: (Dikatakan kepada mereka): "Masuklah kamu ke pintu-pintu neraka Jahannam, sedang kamu kekal di dalamnya. Maka itulah seburuk-buruk tempat bagi orang-orang yang sombong".
t_id.sabiq: Dikatakan lagi kepada mereka, "Azab yang kalian rasakan itu disebabkan oleh kegembiraan kalian di dunia yang bukan pada tempatnya, dan oleh kegembiraan yang berlebih-lebihan atas kesusahan yang menimpa para nabi dan kekasih Allah. Masuklah kalian semua ke dalam pintu-pintu jahanam, yang telah ditetapkan kekal buat kalian! Dan sejelek-jelek tempat tinggal untuk orang-orang yang sombong adalah neraka jahanam."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Masuklah kalian ke pintu-pintu neraka Jahanam, sedangkan kalian kekal di dalamnya. Maka itulah seburuk-buruk tempat) yakni tempat tinggal (bagi orang-orang yang sombong.")
t_id.iwq: (Dikatakan kepada mereka): "Masuklah kamu ke pintu-pintu neraka neraka, sedang kamu kekal di dalamnya. Maka itulah seburuk-buruk tempat bagi orang-orang yang sombong".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ادخلوا أبواب جهنم خالدين فيها فبئس مثوى» مأوى «المتكبرين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: ٱدۡخُلُوٓاْ أَبۡوَٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَاۖ فَبِئۡسَ مَثۡوَى ٱلۡمُتَكَبِّرِينَ (مَثْوَى: مَاوَى، وَمَسْكَنُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Masuklah kalian ke pintu-pintu neraka Jahanam, sedangkan kalian kekal di dalamnya. Maka itulah seburuk-buruk tempat) yakni tempat tinggal (bagi orang-orang yang sombong)

ar: فَٱصۡبِرۡ إِنَّ وَعۡدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقࣱّۚ فَإِمَّا نُرِیَنَّكَ بَعۡضَ ٱلَّذِی نَعِدُهُمۡ أَوۡ نَتَوَفَّیَنَّكَ فَإِلَیۡنَا یُرۡجَعُونَ
ar_simple: فَاصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ اللَّهِ حَقٌّ ۚ فَإِمَّا نُرِيَنَّكَ بَعْضَ الَّذِي نَعِدُهُمْ أَوْ نَتَوَفَّيَنَّكَ فَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ

t.sahih-int: So be patient, [O Muhammad]; indeed, the promise of Allah is truth. And whether We show you some of what We have promised them or We take you in death, it is to Us they will be returned
t.asad: HENCE, remain thou patient in adversity - for, verily, God’s promise always comes true. And whether We show thee [in this world] something of what We hold in store for those [deniers of the truth], or whether We cause thee to die [ere that retribution takes place - know that, in the end], it is unto Us that they will be brought back
t.yusuf-ali: So persevere in patience; for the Promise of Allah is true: and whether We show thee (in this life) some part of what We promise them,- or We take thy soul (to Our Mercy) (before that),-(in any case) it is to Us that they shall (all) return
t.pickthall: Then have patience (O Muhammad). Lo! the promise of Allah is true. And whether we let thee see a part of that which We promise them, or (whether) We cause thee to die, still unto Us they will be brought back
t.arberry: So be thou patient; surely God's promise is true. Whether We show thee a part of that We promise them, or We call thee unto Us, to Us they shall be returned
t.hilali-khan: So be patient (O Muhammad SAW), verily, the Promise of Allah is true, and whether We show you (O Muhammad SAW in this world) some part of what We have promised them, or We cause you to die, then it is to Us they all shall be returned
t.itani: So be patient. The promise of God is true. Whether We show you some of what We have promised them, or take you to Us, to Us they will be returned.
t.mubarakpuri: So be patient, verily, the promise of Allah is true and whether We show you some part of what We have promised them, or We cause you to die, then still it is to Us they all shall be returned.
t.qarib: So be patient, [Prophet,] for God's promise is true. Whether We show you some of what We have promised them or We cause you to die, It is to Us that they will be returned
t.wahiduddin: So be patient [Prophet], for God's promise is true: whether We show you part of what We have promised them in this life, or cause you to die first, it is to Us that they will be recalled
t.shakir: So be patient, surely the promise of Allah is true. So should We make you see part of what We threaten them with, or should We cause you to die, to Us shall they be returned
t.haleem: So be patient [Prophet], for God’s promise is sure: whether We show you part of what We have promised them in this life or whether We take your soul back to Us first, it is to Us that they will be returned
t.maariful: Therefore, be patient. Surely, Allah’s promise is true. Then, (O Prophet,) whether We show you (in your life) a part of the promise We are making to them, or make you die (before they are punished), in any case they have to be returned to Us
t.khattab: So be patient ˹O Prophet˺. Surely Allah’s promise is true. Whether We show you some of what We threaten them with, or cause you to die ˹before that˺, to Us they will ˹all˺ be returned
t.ghali: So (endure) patiently; surely the promise of Allah is true. So whether We definitely show you some of (the pains) We promise them or We definitely take you up (to Us), then to Us they will be returned
t.irving: Yet be patient: God´s promise will come true whether We show you part of what We promise them or recall you to Us; to Us they (too) will be returned
t.iwq: So be patient, O Muhammad; indeed, the promise of Allah is truth. And whether We show you some of what We have promised them or We take you in death, it is to Us they will be returned

t_id.kemenag: Maka bersabarlah kamu, sesungguhnya janji Allah adalah benar; maka meskipun Kami perlihatkan kepadamu sebagian siksa yang Kami ancamkan kepada mereka ataupun Kami wafatkan kamu (sebelum ajal menimpa mereka), namun kepada Kami sajalah mereka dikembalikan.
t_id.sabiq: Bersabarlah, hai Muhammad! Sesungguhnya janji Allah untuk menyiksa musuh-musuhmu adalah benar, tidak diragukan lagi. Azab itu bisa jadi akan menimpa mereka pada saat kamu masih hidup, atau saat mereka kembali kepada Kami. Apabila Kami memperlihatkan kepadamu sebagian azab yang Kami janjikan itu saat kamu masih hidup, maka itu pasti akan terjadi. Dan apabila Kami mematikanmu sebelum itu, maka hanya kepada Kamilah mereka akan kembali. Saat itu mereka kami hitung berdasarkan perbuatan yang pernah mereka lakukan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka bersabarlah kamu, sesungguhnya janji Allah) yang akan mengazab mereka (adalah benar; maka jika Kami perlihatkan kepadamu) lafal Immaa adalah berasal dari In Syarthiyah yang diidgamkan kepada Maa Zaidah yang berfungsi mengukuhkan makna Syarat di awal Fi'il, kemudian menyusul Nun Taukid sesudahnya yang juga mengukuhkan makna syarath tadi (sebagian siksa yang Kami ancamkan kepada mereka) yakni semasa kamu masih hidup Kami menurunkan sebagian azab kepada mereka. Jawab Syarathnya tidak disebutkan, yaitu lafal Fadzaaka, yakni maka itulah sebagian dari azab Kami (atau pun Kami wafatkan kamu) yaitu sebelum mereka diazab (namun kepada Kami sajalah mereka dikembalikan) lalu Kami akan mengazab mereka dengan siksaan yang sangat keras. Jawab Syarath yang telah disebutkan di atas tadi hanyalah untuk Ma'thuf saja, yakni hanya untuk kalimah, Fa-immaa Nuriyannaka Ba'dhal Ladzii Na'iduhum, Fadzaaka.
t_id.iwq: Maka bersabarlah kamu, sesungguhnya janji Allah adalah benar; maka meskipun Kami perlihatkan kepadamu sebagian siksa yang Kami ancamkan kepada mereka ataupun Kami wafatkan kamu (sebelum ajal menimpa mereka), namun kepada Kami sajalah mereka dikembalikan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فاصبر إن وعد الله» بعذابهم «حق فإما نرينَّك» فيه إن الشرطية مدغمة وما زائدة تؤكد معنى الشرط أول الفعل والنون تؤكد آخره «بعض الذي نعدهم» به من العذاب في حياتك وجواب الشرط محذوف، أي فذاك «أو نتوفينك» أي قبل تعذيبهم «فإلينا يرجعون» فنعذبهم أشد العذاب فالجواب المذكور للمعطوف فقط
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَٱصۡبِرۡ إِنَّ وَعۡدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقّٞۚ فَإِمَّا نُرِيَنَّكَ بَعۡضَ ٱلَّذِي نَعِدُهُمۡ أَوۡ نَتَوَفَّيَنَّكَ فَإِلَيۡنَا يُرۡجَعُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka bersabarlah kamu, sesungguhnya janji Allah) yang akan mengazab mereka (adalah benar; maka jika Kami perlihatkan kepadamu) lafal Immaa adalah berasal dari In Syarthiyah yang diidgamkan kepada Maa Zaidah yang berfungsi mengukuhkan makna Syarat di awal Fi'il, kemudian menyusul Nun Taukid sesudahnya yang juga mengukuhkan makna syarath tadi (sebagian siksa yang Kami ancamkan kepada mereka) yakni semasa kamu masih hidup Kami menurunkan sebagian azab kepada mereka. Jawab Syarathnya tidak disebutkan, yaitu lafal Fadzaaka, yakni maka itulah sebagian dari azab Kami (atau pun Kami wafatkan kamu) yaitu sebelum mereka diazab (namun kepada Kami sajalah mereka dikembalikan) lalu Kami akan mengazab mereka dengan siksaan yang sangat keras. Jawab Syarath yang telah disebutkan di atas tadi hanyalah untuk Ma'thuf saja, yakni hanya untuk kalimah, Fa-immaa Nuriyannaka Ba'dhal Ladzii Na'iduhum, Fadzaaka

ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا رُسُلࣰا مِّن قَبۡلِكَ مِنۡهُم مَّن قَصَصۡنَا عَلَیۡكَ وَمِنۡهُم مَّن لَّمۡ نَقۡصُصۡ عَلَیۡكَۗ وَمَا كَانَ لِرَسُولٍ أَن یَأۡتِیَ بِءَایَةٍ إِلَّا بِإِذۡنِ ٱللَّهِۚ فَإِذَا جَاۤءَ أَمۡرُ ٱللَّهِ قُضِیَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ ٱلۡمُبۡطِلُونَ
ar_simple: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلًا مِنْ قَبْلِكَ مِنْهُمْ مَنْ قَصَصْنَا عَلَيْكَ وَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ لَمْ نَقْصُصْ عَلَيْكَ ۗ وَمَا كَانَ لِرَسُولٍ أَنْ يَأْتِيَ بِآيَةٍ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ اللَّهِ ۚ فَإِذَا جَاءَ أَمْرُ اللَّهِ قُضِيَ بِالْحَقِّ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ الْمُبْطِلُونَ

t.sahih-int: And We have already sent messengers before you. Among them are those [whose stories] We have related to you, and among them are those [whose stories] We have not related to you. And it was not for any messenger to bring a sign [or verse] except by permission of Allah. So when the command of Allah comes, it will be concluded in truth, and the falsifiers will thereupon lose [all]
t.asad: And, indeed, [O Muhammad,] We sent forth apostles before thy time; some of them We have mentioned to thee, and some of them We have not mentioned to thee. And it was not given to any apostle to bring forth a miracle other than by God’s leave. Yet when God’s will becomes manifest, judgment will [already] have been passed in all justice, and lost will be, then and there, all who tried to reduce to nothing [whatever they could not understand]
t.yusuf-ali: We did aforetime send messengers before thee: of them there are some whose story We have related to thee, and some whose story We have not related to thee. It was not (possible) for any messenger to bring a sign except by the leave of Allah: but when the Command of Allah issued, the matter was decided in truth and justice, and there perished, there and then those who stood on Falsehoods
t.pickthall: Verily We sent messengers before thee, among them those of whom We have told thee, and some of whom We have not told thee; and it was not given to any messenger that he should bring a portent save by Allah's leave, but when Allah's commandment cometh (the cause) is judged aright, and the followers of vanity will then be lost
t.arberry: We sent Messengers before thee; of some We have related to thee, and some We have not related to thee. It was not for any Messenger to bring a sign, save by God's leave. When God's command comes, justly the issue shall be decided; then the vain-doers shall be lost
t.hilali-khan: And, indeed We have sent Messengers before you (O Muhammad SAW); of some of them We have related to you their story and of some We have not related to you their story, and it was not given to any Messenger that he should bring a sign except by the Leave of Allah. So, when comes the Commandment of Allah, the matter will be decided with truth, and the followers of falsehood will then be lost
t.itani: We sent messengers before you. Some of them We told you about, and some We did not tell you about. No messenger can bring a miracle except by leave of God. Then, when the command of God is issued, fair judgment will be passed, and there and then the seekers of vanity will lose.
t.mubarakpuri: And, indeed We have sent Messengers before you, of some of them We have related to you their story. And of some We have not related to you their story, and it was not given to any Messenger that he should bring a sign except by the leave of Allah. But, when comes the commandment of Allah, the matter will be decided with truth, and the followers of falsehood will then be lost.
t.qarib: We have sent messengers before you. Some We have told you about, and others We did not. No messenger can produce a miracle except with God's permission. Then, when God's command comes, just judgment will be passed, and those who followed falsehood will be lost then and there
t.wahiduddin: Before your time We sent other messengers: of them there are some whose story We have related to you, and some whose story We have not related to you. It was not [possible] for any messenger to bring a sign except by the leave of God: but when the command of God was issued, the matter was decided in truth and justice. There and then, those who stood on falsehoods perished
t.shakir: And certainly We sent apostles before you: there are some of them that We have mentioned to you and there are others whom We have not mentioned to you, and it was not meet for an apostle that he should bring a sign except with Allah's permission, but when the command of Allah came, judgment was given with truth, and those who treated (it) as a lie were lost
t.haleem: We have sent other messengers before you- some We have mentioned to you and some We have not- and no messenger could bring about a sign except with God’s permission. When [the Day] God ordained comes, just judgement will be passed between them: there and then, those who followed falsehood will be lost
t.maariful: We had sent messengers before you. Among them there are those whose history We have narrated to you, and of them there are those whose history We did not narrate to you. And it is not up to a messenger that he could come up with a sign without permission from Allah. So, when the command of Allah will come, matters will stand decided justly, and on that occasion all adherents of falsehood will turn into losers
t.khattab: We already sent messengers before you. We have told you the stories of some of them, while others We have not. It was not for any messenger to bring a sign without Allah’s permission. But when Allah’s decree comes, judgment will be passed with fairness, and the people of falsehood will then be in ˹total˺ loss
t.ghali: And indeed We already sent Messengers even before you. Among them are the ones whom We related to you, and (some) We have not related to you; and in no way (could) any Messenger come up with a sign except by the permission of Allah. Then when the Command of Allah comes, (their end) is decreed with the Truth, and there over the wrong-doers (Literally: doers of void "deeds") will lose
t.irving: We have sent messengers before you, some of whom We have told you about, while We have not told you about others. No messenger may bring any sign unless it is with God´s permission. Once God´s command comes, [matters] will be decided correctly, and that is where the quibblers will lose out
t.iwq: And We have already sent messengers before you. Among them are those whose stories We have related to you, and among them are those whose stories We have not related to you. And it was not for any messenger to bring a sign or verse except by permission of Allah. So when the command of Allah comes, it will be concluded in truth, and the falsifiers will thereupon lose all

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami utus beberapa orang rasul sebelum kamu, di antara mereka ada yang Kami ceritakan kepadamu dan di antara mereka ada (pula) yang tidak Kami ceritakan kepadamu. Tidak dapat bagi seorang rasul membawa suatu mukjizat, melainkan dengan seizin Allah; maka apabila telah datang perintah Allah, diputuskan (semua perkara) dengan adil. Dan ketika itu rugilah orang-orang yang berpegang kepada yang batil.
t_id.sabiq: Kami bersumpah, bahwa Kami benar-benar telah mengutus banyak rasul sebelummu. Di antara mereka ada yang Kami sampaikan kabarnya, dan ada juga yang tidak Kami sampaikan. Seorang rasul dari mereka itu tidak akan mendatangkan mukjizat kecuali atas kehendak Allah, bukan dari dirinya sendiri atau usulan kaumnya. Dari itu, apabila perintah Allah untuk mendatangkan azab telah tiba, baik di dunia maupun di akhirat, Dia menyelesaikan urusan mereka dengan adil. Pada saat itu para pelaku kebatilan menjadi rugi.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami utus rasul-rasul sebelum kamu; di antara mereka ada yang Kami ceritakan kepadamu dan di antara mereka ada -pula- yang tidak Kami ceritakan kepadamu) menurut suatu riwayat diceritakan, bahwa Allah swt. telah mengutus delapan ribu orang nabi untuk menjadi rasul; yang empat ribu orang di antaranya dari kaum Bani Israel, sedangkan yang empat ribu orang lagi dari kalangan umat-umat selain Bani Israel. (Tidak dapat bagi seorang rasul) di antara rasul-rasul itu (membawa suatu mukjizat, melainkan dengan seizin Allah) karena mereka juga hamba-hamba Allah yang diperintah oleh-Nya (maka apabila telah datang perintah Allah) yang memerintahkan supaya azab diturunkan atas orang-orang kafir (diputuskan) semua perkara di antara rasul-rasul dan orang-orang yang mendustakannya (dengan adil. Dan ketika itu rugilah orang-orang yang berpegang kepada yang batil) yakni, keputusan itu merupakan kemenangan bagi rasul-rasul dan kerugian bagi orang-orang yang mendustakannya; pada hakikatnya sebelum itu pun orang-orang yang mendustakan para rasul sudah merugi.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami utus beberapa orang rasul sebelum kamu, di antara mereka ada yang Kami ceritakan kepadamu dan di antara mereka ada (pula) yang tidak Kami ceritakan kepadamu. Tidak dapat bagi seorang rasul membawa suatu mukjizat, melainkan dengan seizin Allah; maka apabila telah datang perintah Allah, diputuskan (semua perkara) dengan adil. Dan ketika itu rugilah orang-orang yang berpegang kepada yang batil.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد أرسلنا رسلا من قبلك منهم من قصصنا عليك ومنهم من لم نقصص عليك» روي أنه تعالى بعث ثمانية آلاف نبي: أربعة آلاف نبي من بني إسرائيل، وأربعة آلاف من سائر الناس «وما كان لرسولِ» منهم «أن يأتي بآية إلا بإذن الله» لأنهم عبيد مربوبون «فإذا جاء أمر الله» بنزول العذاب على الكفار «قضي» بين الرسل ومكذبيها «بالحق وخسر هنالك المبطلون» أي ظهر القضاء والخسران للناس وهم خاسرون في كل وقت قبل ذلك
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا رُسُلٗا مِّن قَبۡلِكَ مِنۡهُم مَّن قَصَصۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ وَمِنۡهُم مَّن لَّمۡ نَقۡصُصۡ عَلَيۡكَۗ وَمَا كَانَ لِرَسُولٍ أَن يَأۡتِيَ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِلَّا بِإِذۡنِ ٱللَّهِۚ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَمۡرُ ٱللَّهِ قُضِيَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ ٱلۡمُبۡطِلُونَ (قُضِيَ بِالْحَقِّ: حُكِمَ بِالعَدْلِ بَيْنَ الرُّسُلِ، وَمُكَذِّبِيهِمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami utus rasul-rasul sebelum kamu; di antara mereka ada yang Kami ceritakan kepadamu dan di antara mereka ada -pula- yang tidak Kami ceritakan kepadamu) menurut suatu riwayat diceritakan, bahwa Allah swt. telah mengutus delapan ribu orang nabi untuk menjadi rasul; yang empat ribu orang di antaranya dari kaum Bani Israel, sedangkan yang empat ribu orang lagi dari kalangan umat-umat selain Bani Israel. (Tidak dapat bagi seorang rasul) di antara rasul-rasul itu (membawa suatu mukjizat, melainkan dengan seizin Allah) karena mereka juga hamba-hamba Allah yang diperintah oleh-Nya (maka apabila telah datang perintah Allah) yang memerintahkan supaya azab diturunkan atas orang-orang kafir (diputuskan) semua perkara di antara rasul-rasul dan orang-orang yang mendustakannya (dengan adil. Dan ketika itu rugilah orang-orang yang berpegang kepada yang batil) yakni, keputusan itu merupakan kemenangan bagi rasul-rasul dan kerugian bagi orang-orang yang mendustakannya; pada hakikatnya sebelum itu pun orang-orang yang mendustakan para rasul sudah merugi

ar: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِی جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَنۡعَـٰمَ لِتَرۡكَبُوا۟ مِنۡهَا وَمِنۡهَا تَأۡكُلُونَ
ar_simple: اللَّهُ الَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الْأَنْعَامَ لِتَرْكَبُوا مِنْهَا وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ

t.sahih-int: It is Allah who made for you the grazing animals upon which you ride, and some of them you eat
t.asad: It is God who [at all times works wonders for you: thus, He] provides for you [all manner of] livestock, so that on some of them you may ride, and from some derive your food
t.yusuf-ali: It is Allah Who made cattle for you, that ye may use some for riding and some for food
t.pickthall: Allah it is Who hath appointed for you cattle, that ye may ride on some of them, and eat of some
t.arberry: It is God who appointed for you the cattle, some of them to ride and of some you eat
t.hilali-khan: Allah, it is He Who has made cattle for you, that you may ride on some of them and of some you eat
t.itani: God is He who created the domestic animals for you—some for you to ride, and some you eat.
t.mubarakpuri: Allah, it is He Who has made cattle for you, that you may ride on some of them, and of some you eat.
t.qarib: It is God who made the domestic animals, some for you to ride, and some to eat
t.wahiduddin: It is God who provides livestock for you, some for riding and some for your food
t.shakir: Allah is He Who made the cattle for you that you may ride on some of them, and some of them you eat
t.haleem: It is God who provides livestock for you, some for riding and some for your food
t.maariful: Allah is the One who made for you the cattle, so that you may ride some of them,- and of them you eat
t.khattab: It is Allah Who made cattle for you so that you may ride some and eat others
t.ghali: Allah is (The One) Who made for you the cattle (Ancam includes cattle, camels, sheep and goats) that you may ride (some) of them, and of (some) you eat
t.irving: God is the One Who has granted you livestock so you may ride on some and eat from others
t.iwq: It indeed is Allah who made for you the grazing animals upon which you ride, and some of them you eat

t_id.kemenag: Allahlah yang menjadikan binatang ternak untuk kamu, sebagiannya untuk kamu kendarai dan sebagiannya untuk kamu makan.
t_id.sabiq: Allah yang menundukkan unta kepada kalian. Sebagiannya untuk kalian naiki dan yang lain lagi untuk kalian makan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Allahlah yang menjadikan binatang ternak untuk kalian) menurut suatu pendapat dikatakan, bahwa yang dimaksud hanyalah unta saja. Tetapi menurut pendapat yang kuat, ternak yang dimaksud mencakup pula sapi dan kambing (sebagiannya untuk kalian kendarai dan sebagiannya untuk kalian makan.)
t_id.iwq: Allahlah yang menjadikan binatang ternak untuk kamu, sebagiannya untuk kamu kendarai dan sebagiannya untuk kamu makan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «الله الذي جعل لكم الأنعام» قيل: الإبل خاصة هنا والظاهر والبقر والغنم «لتركبوا منها ومنها تأكلون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَنۡعَٰمَ لِتَرۡكَبُواْ مِنۡهَا وَمِنۡهَا تَأۡكُلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Allahlah yang menjadikan binatang ternak untuk kalian) menurut suatu pendapat dikatakan, bahwa yang dimaksud hanyalah unta saja. Tetapi menurut pendapat yang kuat, ternak yang dimaksud mencakup pula sapi dan kambing (sebagiannya untuk kalian kendarai dan sebagiannya untuk kalian makan)

ar: وَلَكُمۡ فِیهَا مَنَـٰفِعُ وَلِتَبۡلُغُوا۟ عَلَیۡهَا حَاجَةࣰ فِی صُدُورِكُمۡ وَعَلَیۡهَا وَعَلَى ٱلۡفُلۡكِ تُحۡمَلُونَ
ar_simple: وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا مَنَافِعُ وَلِتَبْلُغُوا عَلَيْهَا حَاجَةً فِي صُدُورِكُمْ وَعَلَيْهَا وَعَلَى الْفُلْكِ تُحْمَلُونَ

t.sahih-int: And for you therein are [other] benefits and that you may realize upon them a need which is in your breasts; and upon them and upon ships you are carried
t.asad: and find [yet other] benefits in them; and that through them you may attain to the fulfillment of [many] a heartfelt need: for on them, as on ships, you are borne [through life]
t.yusuf-ali: And there are (other) advantages in them for you (besides); that ye may through them attain to any need (there may be) in your hearts; and on them and on ships ye are carried
t.pickthall: (Many) benefits ye have from them - and that ye may satisfy by their means a need that is in your breasts, and may be borne upon them as upon the ship
t.arberry: other uses also you have in them; and that on them you may attain a need in your breasts, and upon them and on the ships you are carried
t.hilali-khan: And you have (many other) benefits from them, and that you may reach by their means a desire that is in your breasts (i.e. carry your goods, loads, etc.), and on them and on ships you are carried
t.itani: And in them you have other benefits as well, and through them you satisfy your needs. And on them, and on the ships, you are transported.
t.mubarakpuri: And you have (many other) benefits from them, and that you may reach by their means a desire that is in your breasts, and on them and on ships you are carried.
t.qarib: You have other benefits from them as well. You can reach any destination you wish on them, and on them and on ships, you are transported
t.wahiduddin: you have other benefits in them too. You can reach any destination you wish on them: they carry you by land, as ships carry you on the sea
t.shakir: And there are advantages for you in them, and that you may attain thereon a want which is in your breasts, and upon them and upon the ships you are borne
t.haleem: you have other benefits in them too. You can reach any destination you wish on them: they carry you, as ships carry you [on the sea]
t.maariful: and for you there are (other) benefits in them- and so that, (by riding) on them, you meet any need you have in your hearts; and on them and on boats you are carried
t.khattab: Also, you find in them ˹other˺ benefits. And by means of them you may reach destinations you desire. And you are carried upon ˹some of˺ them and upon ships
t.ghali: And (other) profits you have from them; and that on them you may attain (Literally: reach) a need in your breasts, and upon them and on the ships you are carried
t.irving: You receive benefits from them so that by means of them, you may satisfy any need you have in mind; on them and on shipboard are you transported
t.iwq: And for you therein are other benefits and that you may realize upon them a need which is in your breasts; and upon them and upon ships you are carried

t_id.kemenag: Dan (ada lagi) manfaat-manfaat yang lain pada binatang ternak itu untuk kamu dan supaya kamu mencapai suatu keperluan yang tersimpan dalam hati dengan mengendarainya. Dan kamu dapat diangkut dengan mengendarai binatang-binatang itu dan dengan mengendarai bahtera.
t_id.sabiq: Juga untuk banyak keperluan lain--selain untuk dinaiki dan dimakan--seperti menarik atau mengangkut barang berat dan lain-lain. Di atas unta, yang merupakan salah satu jenis hewan, dan di atas kapal, kalian dan barang-barang kalian dapat diangkut.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan -ada lagi- manfaat-manfaat lain pada binatang ternak itu untuk kalian) yaitu berupa air susu, keturunan binatang ternak itu dan juga dari bulu-bulunya (dan supaya kalian mencapai suatu keperluan yang tersimpan dalam hati) maksudnya, dapat kalian gunakan untuk mengangkut barang-barang ke berbagai negeri (dengan mengendarainya) di daratan (dan dengan menaiki bahtera) yakni perahu melalui jalan laut (kalian dapat menaiki semuanya.)
t_id.iwq: Dan (ada lagi) manfaat-manfaat yang lain pada binatang ternak itu untuk kamu dan supaya kamu mencapai suatu keperluan yang tersimpan dalam hati dengan mengendarainya. Dan kamu dapat diangkut dengan mengendarai binatang-binatang itu dan dengan mengendarai bahtera.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولكم فيها منافع» من الدر والنسل والوبر والصوف «ولتبلغوا عليها حاجة في صدوركم» هي حمل الأثقال إلى البلاد «وعليها» في البر «وعلى الفلك» السفن في البحر «تحملون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَكُمۡ فِيهَا مَنَٰفِعُ وَلِتَبۡلُغُواْ عَلَيۡهَا حَاجَةٗ فِي صُدُورِكُمۡ وَعَلَيۡهَا وَعَلَى ٱلۡفُلۡكِ تُحۡمَلُونَ (حَاجَةً فِي صُدُورِكُمْ: أَمْرًا ذَا بَالٍ تَهْتَمُّونَ بِهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan -ada lagi- manfaat-manfaat lain pada binatang ternak itu untuk kalian) yaitu berupa air susu, keturunan binatang ternak itu dan juga dari bulu-bulunya (dan supaya kalian mencapai suatu keperluan yang tersimpan dalam hati) maksudnya, dapat kalian gunakan untuk mengangkut barang-barang ke berbagai negeri (dengan mengendarainya) di daratan (dan dengan menaiki bahtera) yakni perahu melalui jalan laut (kalian dapat menaiki semuanya)

ar: وَیُرِیكُمۡ ءَایَـٰتِهِۦ فَأَیَّ ءَایَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ تُنكِرُونَ
ar_simple: وَيُرِيكُمْ آيَاتِهِ فَأَيَّ آيَاتِ اللَّهِ تُنْكِرُونَ

t.sahih-int: And He shows you His signs. So which of the signs of Allah do you deny
t.asad: And [thus] He displays His wonders before you: which, then, of God’s wonders can you still deny
t.yusuf-ali: And He shows you (always) His Signs: then which of the Signs of Allah will ye deny
t.pickthall: And He showeth you His tokens. Which, then, of the tokens of Allah do ye deny
t.arberry: And He shows you His signs; then which of God's signs do you reject
t.hilali-khan: And He shows you His Signs and Proofs (of His Oneness in all the above mentioned things). Which, then of the Signs and Proofs of Allah do you deny
t.itani: And He shows you His signs. So which of God’s signs will you deny?
t.mubarakpuri: And He shows you His Ayat. Which, then of the Ayat of Allah do you deny
t.qarib: And [thus] He shows you His signs. So, which of God's signs do you deny
t.wahiduddin: He shows you His signs; which then of the signs of God will you deny
t.shakir: And He shows you His signs: which then of Allah's signs will you deny
t.haleem: He shows you His signs: which of God’s signs do you still ignore
t.maariful: He shows you His signs. Then, which of the signs of Allah would you (still) deny
t.khattab: And He shows you His signs. Now which of Allah’s signs will you deny
t.ghali: And He shows you His signs; then whichever of the signs of Allah do you deny
t.irving: He shows you His signs, so which of God´s signs will you disregard
t.iwq: And He shows you His signs. Thus which of the signs of Allah do you deny

t_id.kemenag: Dan Dia memperlihatkan kepada kamu tanda-tanda (kekuasaan-Nya); maka tanda-tanda (kekuasaan) Allah yang manakah yang kamu ingkari?
t_id.sabiq: Allah telah memperlihatkan kepada kalian bukti-bukti kekuasaan-Nya. Dari itu, perlihatkan kepada-Ku bukti mana yang kalian ingkari? Bukti-bukti itu begitu jelasnya, sehingga tidak mungkin diingkari oleh orang yang daya pikirnya paling rendah sekalipun.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Dia memperlihatkan kepada kalian tanda-tanda-Nya; maka tanda-tanda Allah yang manakah) yakni tanda-tanda yang menunjukkan kepada keesaan-Nya (yang kalian ingkari?) Istifham atau kata tanya di sini mengandung makna cemoohan. Disebutkan lafal Ayyun dalam bentuk Mudzakkar adalah lebih terkenal daripada bentuk Ta'nitsnya.
t_id.iwq: Dan Dia memperlihatkan kepada kamu tanda-tanda (kekuasaan-Nya); maka tanda-tanda (kekuasaan) Allah yang manakah yang kamu ingkari?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ويريكم آياته فأيَّ آيات الله» أي الدالة على وحدانيته «تنكرون» استفهام توبيخ، وتذكير أي أشهر من تأنيثه
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَيُرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَأَيَّ ءَايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ تُنكِرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Dia memperlihatkan kepada kalian tanda-tanda-Nya; maka tanda-tanda Allah yang manakah) yakni tanda-tanda yang menunjukkan kepada keesaan-Nya (yang kalian ingkari?) Istifham atau kata tanya di sini mengandung makna cemoohan. Disebutkan lafal Ayyun dalam bentuk Mudzakkar adalah lebih terkenal daripada bentuk Ta'nitsnya

ar: أَفَلَمۡ یَسِیرُوا۟ فِی ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَیَنظُرُوا۟ كَیۡفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِینَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡۚ كَانُوۤا۟ أَكۡثَرَ مِنۡهُمۡ وَأَشَدَّ قُوَّةࣰ وَءَاثَارࣰا فِی ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَمَاۤ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ یَكۡسِبُونَ
ar_simple: أَفَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ فَيَنْظُرُوا كَيْفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ كَانُوا أَكْثَرَ مِنْهُمْ وَأَشَدَّ قُوَّةً وَآثَارًا فِي الْأَرْضِ فَمَا أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُمْ مَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ

t.sahih-int: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? They were more numerous than themselves and greater in strength and in impression on the land, but they were not availed by what they used to earn
t.asad: HAVE THEY, then, never journeyed about the earth and beheld what happened in the end to those [deniers of the truth] who lived before their time? More numerous were they, and greater in power than they are, and in the impact which they left on earth: but all that they ever achieved was of no avail to them –
t.yusuf-ali: Do they not travel through the earth and see what was the End of those before them? They were more numerous than these and superior in strength and in the traces (they have left) in the land: Yet all that they accomplished was of no profit to them
t.pickthall: Have they not travelled in the land to see the nature of the consequence for those before them? They were more numerous than these, and mightier in power and (in the) traces (which they left behind them) in the earth. But all that they used to earn availed them not
t.arberry: What, have they not journeyed in the land and beheld how was the end of those before them? They were stronger than themselves in might and left firmer traces in the earth; yet that they earned did not avail them
t.hilali-khan: Have they not travelled through the earth and seen what was the end of those before them? They were more numerous than them and mightier in strength, and in the traces (they have left behind them) in the land, yet all that they used to earn availed them not
t.itani: Have they not journeyed through the land, and seen the outcome for those before them? They were more numerous than they, and had greater power and influence in the land. But what they had achieved availed them nothing.
t.mubarakpuri: Have they not traveled through the earth and seen what was the end of those before them They were more in number than them and mightier in strength, and in the traces in the land; yet all that they used to earn availed them not.
t.qarib: Have they not traveled through the land and seen the fate of those who lived before them? They were more numerous than they are, and had greater power, and left more impressive marks on the land. Yet what they achieved was of no use to them
t.wahiduddin: Have they not travelled in the land to see the fate of those who went before them? They were more numerous and mightier and left greater traces of their power on the earth; yet all that they accomplished was of no avail to them
t.shakir: Have they not then journeyed in the land and seen how was the end of those before them? They were more (in numbers) than these and greater in strength and in fortifications in the land, but what they earned did not avail them
t.haleem: Have they not travelled through the land and seen how those who lived before them met their end? They were more numerous than them, stronger than them, and made a more impressive mark on the land, yet what they achieved was of no use to them at all
t.maariful: Have they not traveled through the earth and seen how was the fate of those before them? Most of them were more in numbers than these, and superior in vigor and vestiges left on the earth. So then, whatever they used to earn did not work for them at all
t.khattab: Have they not travelled throughout the land to see what was the end of those who were ˹destroyed˺ before them? They were far superior in might and ˹richer in˺ monuments throughout the land, but their ˹worldly˺ gains were of no benefit to them
t.ghali: Have they then not traveled in the earth so they (could) look into how was the end of the ones before them? They were more numerous than themselves, and more valiant in power, and (left) more tracks in the earth; yet in no way did whatever they used to earn avail them
t.irving: Have you not travelled around the earth and observed what the outcome has been for those who preceded them? They were more numerous and stronger than they are, and they [left greater] remains on earth. Yet whatever they had accomplished did not help them out
t.iwq: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? They were more numerous than themselves and greater in strength and in impression on the land, but they were not availed by what they used to earn

t_id.kemenag: Maka apakah mereka tiada mengadakan perjalanan di muka bumi lalu memperhatikan betapa kesudahan orang-orang yang sebelum mereka. Adalah orang-orang yang sebelum mereka itu lebih hebat kekuatannya dan (lebih banyak) bekas-bekas mereka di muka bumi, maka apa yang mereka usahakan itu tidak dapat menolong mereka.
t_id.sabiq: Apakah mereka hanya duduk berpangku tangan dan tidak berjalan di atas bumi agar bisa melihat bagaimana kehancuran merupakan akibat dari perbuatan bangsa-bangsa sebelum mereka? Mereka berjumlah lebih besar, lebih kuat, dan lebih luas pengaruhnya di bumi. Kendati begitu, azab Allah tidak bisa dihalangi oleh harta, kekuatan, atau kekuasaan mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka apakah mereka tiada mengadakan perjalanan di muka bumi lalu memperhatikan betapa kesudahan orang-orang yang sebelum mereka. Adalah orang-orang yang sebelum mereka itu lebih hebat kekuatannya dan -lebih banyak- bekas-bekas mereka di muka bumi) seperti gedung-gedung dan bangunan-bangunan lainnya sebagai peninggalan mereka (maka apa yang mereka usahakan itu tidak dapat menolong mereka.)
t_id.iwq: Maka apakah mereka tiada mengadakan perjalanan di muka bumi lalu memperhatikan betapa kesudahan orang-orang yang sebelum mereka. Adalah orang-orang yang sebelum mereka itu lebih hebat kekuatannya dan (lebih banyak) bekas-bekas mereka di muka bumi, maka apa yang mereka usahakan itu tidak dapat menolong mereka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أفلم يسيروا في الأرض فينظروا كيف كان عاقبة الذين من قبلهم كانوا أكثر منهم وأشد قوَّةً وأثارا في الأرض» من مصانع وقصور «فما أغنى عنهم ما كانوا يكسبون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَفَلَمۡ يَسِيرُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَيَنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡۚ كَانُوٓاْ أَكۡثَرَ مِنۡهُمۡ وَأَشَدَّ قُوَّةٗ وَءَاثَارٗا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَمَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ (فَمَا أَغْنَى عَنْهُم: فَمَا دَفَعَ عَنْهُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka apakah mereka tiada mengadakan perjalanan di muka bumi lalu memperhatikan betapa kesudahan orang-orang yang sebelum mereka. Adalah orang-orang yang sebelum mereka itu lebih hebat kekuatannya dan -lebih banyak- bekas-bekas mereka di muka bumi) seperti gedung-gedung dan bangunan-bangunan lainnya sebagai peninggalan mereka (maka apa yang mereka usahakan itu tidak dapat menolong mereka)

ar: فَلَمَّا جَاۤءَتۡهُمۡ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلۡبَیِّنَـٰتِ فَرِحُوا۟ بِمَا عِندَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡعِلۡمِ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ یَسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ
ar_simple: فَلَمَّا جَاءَتْهُمْ رُسُلُهُمْ بِالْبَيِّنَاتِ فَرِحُوا بِمَا عِنْدَهُمْ مِنَ الْعِلْمِ وَحَاقَ بِهِمْ مَا كَانُوا بِهِ يَسْتَهْزِئُونَ

t.sahih-int: And when their messengers came to them with clear proofs, they [merely] rejoiced in what they had of knowledge, but they were enveloped by what they used to ridicule
t.asad: for when their apostles came to them with all evidence of the truth, they arrogantly exulted in whatever knowledge they [already] possessed: and [so, in the end,] they were overwhelmed by the very thing which they were wont to deride
t.yusuf-ali: For when their messengers came to them with Clear Signs, they exulted in such knowledge (and skill) as they had; but that very (Wrath) at which they were wont to scoff hemmed them in
t.pickthall: And when their messengers brought them clear proofs (of Allah's Sovereignty) they exulted in the knowledge they (themselves) possessed. And that which they were wont to mock befell them
t.arberry: So, when their Messengers brought them the clear signs, they rejoiced in what knowledge they had, and were encompassed by that they mocked at
t.hilali-khan: Then when their Messengers came to them with clear proofs, they were glad (and proud) with that which they had of the knowledge (of worldly things): And that at which they used to mock, surrounded them (i.e. the punishment)
t.itani: When their messengers came to them with clear proofs, they rejoiced in the knowledge they had, and the very things they used to ridicule besieged them.
t.mubarakpuri: Then when their Messengers came to them with clear proofs, they were glad (and proud) with that which they had of the knowledge (of worldly things). And that at which they used to mock, surrounded them.
t.qarib: When their messengers came to them with self-evident signs, they showed satisfaction with the knowledge they had, and so they were engulfed by the very punishment they had mocked
t.wahiduddin: When messengers came to them with clear signs, they revelled in whatever knowledge they had, and so they were engulfed by the very punishment they mocked
t.shakir: Then when their apostles came to them with clear arguments, they exulted in what they had with them of knowledge, and there beset them that which they used to mock
t.haleem: When messengers came to them with clear signs, they revelled in the knowledge they had, and so they were engulfed by the very punishment they mocked
t.maariful: When their messengers came to them with manifest signs, they exulted because of whatever knowledge they had, and they were encircled by what they used to ridicule
t.khattab: When their messengers came to them with clear proofs, they were prideful in whatever ˹worldly˺ knowledge they had, and were ˹ultimately˺ overwhelmed by what they used to ridicule
t.ghali: So, as soon as their Messengers came to them with the supreme evidence (s), they exulted with what knowledge was in their presence, and what they used to mock at redounded on them
t.irving: when their messengers brought them explanations, they were happy with the knowledge they already possessed; so what they had been making fun of swept in around them
t.iwq: And when their messengers came to them with clear proofs, they merely rejoiced in what they had of knowledge, but they were enveloped by what they used to ridicule

t_id.kemenag: Maka tatkala datang kepada mereka rasul-rasul (yang diutus kepada) mereka dengan membawa ketarangan-keterangan, mereka merasa senang dengan pengetahuan yang ada pada mereka dan mereka dikepung oleh azab Allah yang selalu mereka perolok-olokkan itu.
t_id.sabiq: Pada saat umat-umat itu didatangi oleh para rasul dengan membawa syariat yang jelas, mereka malah membanggakan ilmu pengetahuan dunia yang mereka punyai, dan sebaliknya meremehkan ilmu para rasul. Maka mereka kemudian ditimpa azab yang pernah dijanjikan para rasul dan mereka remehkan itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka tatkala datang kepada mereka rasul-rasul mereka dengan membawa keterangan-keterangan) yakni mukjizat-mukjizat yang nyata (mereka merasa senang) orang-orang kafir itu (dengan apa yang ada pada mereka) yakni rasul-rasul itu (yaitu pengetahuan mereka) pengertian gembira di sini mengandung makna ejekan dan olok-olokan seraya ingkar kepada apa yang didatangkan oleh para rasul itu (dan menimpalah) maksudnya, turunlah (kepada mereka apa yang selalu mereka perolok-olokkan itu) yaitu, azab Allah yang selalu mereka ejek itu.
t_id.iwq: Maka tatkala datang kepada mereka rasul-rasul (yang diutus kepada) mereka dengan membawa ketarangan-keterangan, mereka merasa senang dengan pengetahuan yang ada pada mereka dan mereka dikepung oleh azab Allah yang selalu mereka perolok-olokkan itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فلما جاءتهم رسلهم بالبينات» المعجزات الظاهرات «فرحوا» أي الكفار «بما عندهم» أي الرسل «من العلم» فرح استهزاء وضحك منكرين له «وحاق» نزل «بهم ما كانوا به يستهزءُون» أي العذاب
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتۡهُمۡ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلۡبَيِّنَٰتِ فَرِحُواْ بِمَا عِندَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡعِلۡمِ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ (مِّنَ الْعِلْمِ: العِلْمِ بِالدُّنْيَا، وَبِمَا عِنْدَهُمْ مِنَ الأَبَاطِيلِ الَّتِي يّظُنُّونَهَا عِلْمًا, وَحَاقَ: نَزَلَ وَأَحَاطَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka tatkala datang kepada mereka rasul-rasul mereka dengan membawa keterangan-keterangan) yakni mukjizat-mukjizat yang nyata (mereka merasa senang) orang-orang kafir itu (dengan apa yang ada pada mereka) yakni rasul-rasul itu (yaitu pengetahuan mereka) pengertian gembira di sini mengandung makna ejekan dan olok-olokan seraya ingkar kepada apa yang didatangkan oleh para rasul itu (dan menimpalah) maksudnya, turunlah (kepada mereka apa yang selalu mereka perolok-olokkan itu) yaitu, azab Allah yang selalu mereka ejek itu

ar: فَلَمَّا رَأَوۡا۟ بَأۡسَنَا قَالُوۤا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَحۡدَهُۥ وَكَفَرۡنَا بِمَا كُنَّا بِهِۦ مُشۡرِكِینَ
ar_simple: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْا بَأْسَنَا قَالُوا آمَنَّا بِاللَّهِ وَحْدَهُ وَكَفَرْنَا بِمَا كُنَّا بِهِ مُشْرِكِينَ

t.sahih-int: And when they saw Our punishment, they said," We believe in Allah alone and disbelieve in that which we used to associate with Him
t.asad: And then, when they [clearly] beheld Our punishment, they said: “We have come to believe in the One God, and we have renounced all belief in that to which we were wont to ascribe a share in His divinity!”
t.yusuf-ali: But when they saw Our Punishment, they said: "We believe in Allah,- the one Allah - and we reject the partners we used to join with Him
t.pickthall: Then, when they saw Our doom, they said: We believe in Allah only and reject (all) that we used to associate (with Him)
t.arberry: Then, when they saw Our might, they said, 'We believe in God alone, and we disbelieve in that we were associating with Him
t.hilali-khan: So when they saw Our punishment, they said: "We believe in Allah Alone and reject (all) that we used to associate with Him as (His) partners
t.itani: Then, when they witnessed Our might, they said, “We believe in God alone, and we reject what we used to associate with Him.”
t.mubarakpuri: So when they saw Our punishment, they said: "We believe in Allah Alone and reject (all) that we used to associate with Him as (His) partners."
t.qarib: Then, when they saw Our might, they said," We believe in God alone, and we reject what we used to associate with Him
t.wahiduddin: but when they saw Our punishment, they said, "We believe in God, the One God, and we reject the partners we used to associate with Him
t.shakir: But when they saw Our punishment, they said: We believe in Allah alone and we deny what we used to associate with Him
t.haleem: when they saw Our punishment, they said, ‘We believe in God alone; we reject any partner we ascribed to Him,’
t.maariful: When they saw Our punishment, they said, “We have (now) come to believe in Allah alone, and We have rejected everything we used to ascribe (to Him) as partners.”
t.khattab: When they saw Our punishment, they cried, “˹Now˺ we believe in Allah alone and reject what we had been associating with Him!”
t.ghali: Then, as soon as they saw Our violence, they said, "We believe in Allah alone, and we disbelieve in whatever we used to be associating with Him
t.irving: However once they saw Our might, they said: "We believe in God Alone, and disbelieve in what we used to associate with Him
t.iwq: And when they saw Our punishment, they said," We believe in Allah alone and disbelieve in that which we used to associate with Him

t_id.kemenag: Maka tatkala mereka melihat azab Kami, mereka berkata: "Kami beriman hanya kepada Allah saja, dan kami kafir kepada sembahan-sembahan yang telah kami persekutukan dengan Allah".
t_id.sabiq: Ketika melihat kejamnya azab Kami, mereka mengatakan, "Kami beriman hanya kepada Allah dan ingkar kepada tuhan-tuhan yang menyebabkan kami musyrik."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka tatkala mereka melihat azab Kami) yakni betapa kerasnya azab Kami (mereka berkata, "Kami beriman hanya kepada Allah saja, dan kami kafir kepada sesembahan-sesembahan yang telah kami mempersekutukannya dengan Allah.")
t_id.iwq: Maka tatkala mereka melihat azab Kami, mereka berkata: "Kami beriman hanya kepada Allah saja, dan kami kafir kepada sembahan-sembahan yang telah kami persekutukan dengan Allah".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فلما رأوْا بأسنا» أي شدة عذابنا «قالوا آمنا بالله وحده وكفرنا بما كنا به مشركين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَلَمَّا رَأَوۡاْ بَأۡسَنَا قَالُوٓاْ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَحۡدَهُۥ وَكَفَرۡنَا بِمَا كُنَّا بِهِۦ مُشۡرِكِينَ (بَاسَنَا: عَذَابَنَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka tatkala mereka melihat azab Kami) yakni betapa kerasnya azab Kami (mereka berkata, "Kami beriman hanya kepada Allah saja, dan kami kafir kepada sesembahan-sesembahan yang telah kami mempersekutukannya dengan Allah)

ar: فَلَمۡ یَكُ یَنفَعُهُمۡ إِیمَـٰنُهُمۡ لَمَّا رَأَوۡا۟ بَأۡسَنَاۖ سُنَّتَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّتِی قَدۡ خَلَتۡ فِی عِبَادِهِۦۖ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ ٱلۡكَـٰفِرُونَ
ar_simple: فَلَمْ يَكُ يَنْفَعُهُمْ إِيمَانُهُمْ لَمَّا رَأَوْا بَأْسَنَا ۖ سُنَّتَ اللَّهِ الَّتِي قَدْ خَلَتْ فِي عِبَادِهِ ۖ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ الْكَافِرُونَ

t.sahih-int: But never did their faith benefit them once they saw Our punishment. [It is] the established way of Allah which has preceded among His servants. And the disbelievers thereupon lost [all]
t.asad: But their attaining to faith after they had beheld Our punishment could not possibly benefit them such being the way of God that has always obtained for His creatures -: and so, then and there, lost were they who had denied the truth
t.yusuf-ali: But their professing the Faith when they (actually) saw Our Punishment was not going to profit them. (Such has been) Allah's Way of dealing with His Servants (from the most ancient times). And even thus did the Rejecters of Allah perish (utterly)
t.pickthall: But their faith could not avail them when they saw Our doom. This is Allah's law which hath ever taken course for His bondmen. And then the disbelievers will be ruined
t.arberry: But their belief when they saw Our might did not profit them -- the wont of God, as in the past, touching His servants; then the unbelievers shall be lost
t.hilali-khan: Then their Faith (in Islamic Monotheism) could not avail them when they saw Our punishment. (Like) this has been the way of Allah in dealing with His slaves. And there the disbelievers lost utterly (when Our Torment covered them)
t.itani: But their faith could not help them once they witnessed Our might. This has been God’s way of dealing with His servants. And there and then the disbelievers lost.
t.mubarakpuri: Then their Faith could not avail them when they saw Our punishment. (Like) this has been the way of Allah in dealing with His servants. And there the disbelievers lost utterly.
t.qarib: But believing after seeing Our might did not help them at all. This has been God's way of dealing with His worshipers, and those who denied the truth were lost, then and there
t.wahiduddin: but believing after seeing Our punishment did not benefit them at all: this is the law of God to deal with His creatures, and thus the disbelievers were the losers
t.shakir: But their belief was not going to profit them when they had seen Our punishment; (this is) Allah's law, which has indeed obtained in the matter of His servants, and there the unbelievers are lost
t.haleem: but believing after seeing Our punishment did not benefit them at all- this has always been God’s way of dealing with His creatures- there and then the disbelievers were lost
t.maariful: But, their profession of faith was not (competent) to benefit them, once they had seen Our punishment - a customary practice of Allah that has been there all along in the matter of His servants - and hence, the disbelievers became the losers
t.khattab: But their faith was of no benefit to them when they saw Our torment. This has ˹always˺ been Allah’s way ˹of dealing˺ with His ˹wicked˺ servants. Then and there the disbelievers were in ˹total˺ loss
t.ghali: Yet their belief did not in the least profit them as soon as they saw Our violence, the enactment of Allah, which has passed on His bondmen; and there over the disbelievers lost
t.irving: Their [sudden] faith did not benefit them once they saw Our might; [such is] God´s practice which He has already used with His servants. The disbelievers lost out right there
t.iwq: But never did their faith benefit them once they saw Our punishment. It is the established way of Allah which has preceded among His servants. And the disbelievers thereupon lost all

t_id.kemenag: Maka iman mereka tiada berguna bagi mereka tatkala mereka telah melihat siksa Kami. Itulah sunnah Allah yang telah berlaku terhadap hamba-hamba-Nya. Dan di waktu itu binasalah orang-orang kafir.
t_id.sabiq: Tetapi iman yang mereka ucapkan pada saat melihat kejamnya azab itu tidak berguna lagi. Sebab ketentuan Allah telah berlaku pada hamba-Nya, bahwa Dia tidak menerima pernyataan iman yang diucapkan saat diturunkan azab. Saat itu, orang kafir sangat merugi.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka iman mereka tiada berguna bagi mereka tatkala mereka telah melihat siksa Kami. Itulah sunah Allah) dinashabkannya lafal Sunnatallaahi karena menjadi Mashdar dari Fi'il yang diperkirakan keberadaannya, dan Fi'il tersebut diambil dari lafalnya (yang telah berlaku terhadap hamba-hamba-Nya) yaitu pada semua umat, bahwasanya iman tiada gunanya apabila timbul di kala azab turun. (Dan di waktu itu merugilah orang-orang kafir) yakni jelaslah kerugian mereka; masing-masing di antara mereka mengalami kerugian yang nyata; dan memang sebelum itu pun mereka adalah orang-orang yang merugi.
t_id.iwq: Maka iman mereka tiada berguna bagi mereka tatkala mereka telah melihat siksa Kami. Itulah sunnah Allah yang telah berlaku terhadap hamba-hamba-Nya. Dan di waktu itu binasalah orang-orang kafir.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فلم يكُ ينفعهم إيمانهم لما رأوْا بأسنا سُنَّتَ الله» نصبه على المصدر بفعل مقدِّر من لفظه «التي قد خلت في عباده» في الأمم أن لا ينفعهم الإيمان وقت نزول العذاب «وخسر هنالك الكافرون» تبين خسرانهم لكل أحد وهم خاسرون في كل وقت قبل ذلك
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَلَمۡ يَكُ يَنفَعُهُمۡ إِيمَٰنُهُمۡ لَمَّا رَأَوۡاْ بَأۡسَنَاۖ سُنَّتَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّتِي قَدۡ خَلَتۡ فِي عِبَادِهِۦۖ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ (يَكُ: يَكُنْ, سُنَّتَ اللَّهِ: طَرِيَقَتَهُ فِي عَدَمِ قَبُولِ تَوْبَةِ مَنْ عَايَنَ العَذَابَ, خَلَتْ: مَضَتْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka iman mereka tiada berguna bagi mereka tatkala mereka telah melihat siksa Kami. Itulah sunah Allah) dinashabkannya lafal Sunnatallaahi karena menjadi Mashdar dari Fi'il yang diperkirakan keberadaannya, dan Fi'il tersebut diambil dari lafalnya (yang telah berlaku terhadap hamba-hamba-Nya) yaitu pada semua umat, bahwasanya iman tiada gunanya apabila timbul di kala azab turun. (Dan di waktu itu merugilah orang-orang kafir) yakni jelaslah kerugian mereka; masing-masing di antara mereka mengalami kerugian yang nyata; dan memang sebelum itu pun mereka adalah orang-orang yang merugi
